mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) AS TOTAL_DATA_COUNT , #{page} AS PAGE , #{dataCount} AS DATA_COUNT FROM TB_AUTH WHERE 1 = 1 AND DELETED = 0
AND NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
SELECT SEQ, NAME, SORTING , CREATE_IDX, CREATE_DATETIME , UPDATE_IDX, UPDATE_DATETIME FROM TB_AUTH WHERE 1 = 1 AND SEQ = #{seq} AND DELETED = 0
mapper.insert:
SELECT IFNULL(MAX(SORTING), 0) + 1 AS SORTING FROM TB_AUTH
INSERT INTO TB_AUTH (NAME, SORTING, CREATE_IDX, CREATE_DATETIME, DELETED) VALUES (#{name}, #{sorting}, #{createIdx}, NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_AUTH SET DELETED = 1, DELETE_IDX = #{createIdx}, DELETE_DATETIME = NOW() WHERE SEQ = #{seq}

UPDATE TB_AUTH SET DELETED = 1, DELETE_IDX = #{createIdx}, DELETE_DATETIME = NOW() WHERE SEQ IN
#{seq}
